PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-24-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Marta Eisenberg for Terry Fraunfelder.

Ms. Eisenberg stated that she has nothing to add, that they do not have any more information to present and provided an alternative form of order reflecting intestacy. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y. S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
